productName: Rays Lemonade Hash Rosin Cranberry Tangerine Lemonade - 100mg THC : 100mg CBG
description: A boutique infused beverage with sweet-tart lemonade notes, a refreshing finish, and the kind of flavor that makes it feel like a treat before the effects even arrive. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity. Sip slowly and let the hybrid infusion settle in at its own pace.
